title: RAK WisMesh Tag device missing from Platform.io?

messages.author: Jolly
messages.text: Hi All, just started working with MeshCore and Platform.io, I've managed to get some custom firmware onto a Heltec V4, but now I'm looking at writing something for a RAk WisMesh Tag, but I can't see the device in the Platform.io board selector. Does anyone know if that board config exists somewhere I can import it, or will I have to make it myself or wait until it's released?
messages.content_html: Hi All, just started working with MeshCore and Platform.io, I've managed to get some custom firmware onto a Heltec V4, but now I'm looking at writing something for a RAk WisMesh Tag, but I can't see the device in the Platform.io board selector. Does anyone know if that board config exists somewhere I can import it, or will I have to make it myself or wait until it's released?

messages.author: Wilson
messages.text: It’s in the folder. Just finished the TapTapFW for WisMeshTag.
messages.content_html: It’s in the folder. Just finished the TapTapFW for WisMeshTag.
messages.reply_html:
Jolly
